parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(confirmed_zar), 0) AS income_total FROM income WHERE confirmed_zar IS NOT NULL AND date_trunc('month', pay_date) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(budget_amount), 0) AS fixed_total FROM categories WHERE type = 'true_fixed' AND active = true

INSERT INTO budgets (month, income_total, savings_10pct, slush_5pct, weekly_budget, weekend_budget, week_number) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7) ON CONFLICT (month, week_number) DO UPDATE SET income_total = EXCLUDED.income_total, savings_10pct = EXCLUDED.savings_10pct, slush_5pct = EXCLUDED.slush_5pct, weekly_budget = EXCLUDED.weekly_budget, weekend_budget = EXCLUDED.weekend_budget RETURNING week_number, weekly_budget, weekend_budget
